docs.title: Home
docs.text:
OAIC INTERNAL GUIDE

ESR AutoDoc Choose. Follow. Done.

選擇工作，跟著圖片一步一步完成。

START HERE

What do you want to do? 0 ☁️ First-time setup 第一次設定 1 📊 3DLA Overview 產生明日 Overview 2 📝 3DLA MoM 產生明日 MoM 3 📸 DPR 產生明日 DPR 4 🎓 ESR Training P / CP training workflow Each guide has English and 中文 in the top menu. 1Close Office files 2Run the .cmd file 3Check before issue 💬 Send feedback / 提供建議 Name / 姓名 OAIC email / 公司信箱 Guide / 教學 Select a guide Step 0 - SharePoint / OneDrive Setup Step 1 - 3DLA Overview Step 2 - 3DLA MoM Step 3 - DPR Step 4 - ESR Training Website / General Suggestion / 建議 Screenshot / 截圖（選填） Send / 送出 OAIC Power System Solutions Internal guide · Version v0.7 · Maintained by Charlie Tseng

docs.title: 3DLA MoM｜5 steps
docs.text:
📊 Finish Overview → 📝 Generate MoM 1 💾 Finish and save tomorrow's Overview 2 ❌ Close every Word window 3 🖱️ Double-click the .cmd file in MoM Close Word First - Generate Tomorrow 3DLA MoM.cmd 4 📄 Open the new Word file 5 🔎 Check 4 places

Date · Meeting no. · Attachment A · Attachment B

A MoM for the same date already exists

The tool stops without overwriting. Use -Overwrite only when you are sure.

Folder locations
  • MoM: OAIC Ltd\PROJECT_TWSHXESR - Documents\General\3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA\MoM
  • Overview: OAIC Ltd\PROJECT_TWSHXESR - Documents\General\3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA\Overview
Regenerate the same date 
powershell -Sta -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "Generate Tomorrow 3DLA MoM - Code.ps1" -TargetDate "2026-07-06" -Overwrite -Open

docs.title: 3DLA MoM｜5 步完成
docs.text:
📊 Overview 完成後 → 📝 產生 MoM 1 💾 完成並儲存明日 Overview 2 ❌ 關閉所有 Word 視窗 3 🖱️ 在 MoM 資料夾雙擊 .cmd Close Word First - Generate Tomorrow 3DLA MoM.cmd 4 📄 開啟新產生的 Word 5 🔎 檢查 4 個位置

Date · Meeting no. · Attachment A · Attachment B

同一天的 MoM 已存在

程式會停止，不會覆蓋。確定要重做時，才使用 -Overwrite。

資料夾位置
  • MoM：OAIC Ltd\PROJECT_TWSHXESR - Documents\General\3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA\MoM
  • Overview：OAIC Ltd\PROJECT_TWSHXESR - Documents\General\3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA\Overview
重新產生同一天的 MoM 
powershell -Sta -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "Generate Tomorrow 3DLA MoM - Code.ps1" -TargetDate "2026-07-06" -Overwrite -Open

docs.title: 3DLA Overview｜4 steps
docs.text:
1 ❌ Close the latest Overview Excel 2 🖱️ Double-click the .cmd file Close Excel First - Generate Tomorrow 3DLA.cmd 3 ⏳ Wait until it finishes

The new file appears in the same folder.

4 🔎 Open → Check → Issue

Date · Activities · Simops · Remarks

Error?

Close every Excel window, then run the .cmd file again.

What the tool does automatically
  • Creates tomorrow's file and updates the date
  • Moves look-ahead activities forward
  • Adjusts rows and colours
  • Keeps Simops / Remarks

docs.title: 3DLA Overview｜4 步完成
docs.text:
1 ❌ 關閉最新的 Overview Excel 2 🖱️ 雙擊 .cmd Close Excel First - Generate Tomorrow 3DLA.cmd 3 ⏳ 等待程式完成

新檔案會自動出現在同一個資料夾。

4 🔎 打開新檔 → 檢查 → 發出

Date · Activities · Simops · Remarks

出現錯誤？

關閉所有 Excel 視窗，再雙擊 .cmd。

程式自動完成的內容
  • 產生明日檔案並更新日期
  • 將 look-ahead activities 往前帶
  • 自動調整列數與底色
  • 保留 Simops / Remarks

docs.title: DPR｜5 steps
docs.text:
1 ❌ Close every Word window 2 🖱️ Double-click the .cmd file in DPR Close Word First - Generate Tomorrow DPR.cmd 3 ⏱️ Wait about 1 minute

The CMD window may stay open while it works.

4 🔓 Open the new DPR → Enable Content

5 💾 Fill in → Fit Pictures → Ctrl + S

Date · Activities · Photos · Teams offshore

DPR is a .docm file

Word AutoSave is not supported. Press Ctrl + S before closing.

What the tool does automatically
  • Updates file name, Doc No., Report Date and footer
  • Imports past / next 24hrs activities from 3DLA Overview
  • Clears old photos and resets #1–#8
  • Keeps 8 OSS / TJB picture slots
  • Updates Toolbox Meeting / PTW totals

docs.title: DPR｜5 步完成
docs.text:
1 ❌ 關閉所有 Word 視窗 2 🖱️ 在 DPR 資料夾雙擊 .cmd Close Word First - Generate Tomorrow DPR.cmd 3 ⏱️ 等待約 1 分鐘

CMD 視窗停留是正常的。

4 🔓 開啟新 DPR → Enable Content

5 💾 填寫 → Fit Pictures → Ctrl + S

Date · Activities · Photos · Teams offshore

DPR 是 .docm

Word AutoSave 不支援。關閉前按 Ctrl + S。

程式自動完成的內容
  • 更新檔名、Doc No.、Report Date、頁尾
  • 從 3DLA Overview 帶入 past / next 24hrs activities
  • 清除舊照片並重設 #1–#8
  • 保留 8 格 OSS / TJB Pictures
  • 更新 Toolbox Meeting / PTW totals

docs.title: ESR P/CP Training｜Follow in order
docs.text:
About 95% automated · Small bugs are fixed as found ▶️ Always start here Run ESR Training Automation (English).cmd

These commands send real emails

Commands 3 and 7 send immediately. Check people and email addresses first.

docs.title: Daily workflowGet the candidate listCLI → Command 1CLI → Command 2CLI → Command 3CLI → Command 4, then Command 5CLI → Command 6CLI → Command 7
docs.text:
1 📨

Send 1. Person _ CP Candidate Request.oft

Received Excel → place in 01_Inbox\P_CP Candidate Lists

2 📥

Import contractor P/CP candidate list

If COPY TO TEMPLATE 2 appears: copy names → paste into Template 2 → send to contractor.

3 🌐

Add SharePoint Site access

Do not use the mouse or keyboard while it runs.

4 ✉️

Send Training invitations

Check white rows → run → emails send immediately.

5 🔎

Scan pending people → check Training Hub results

Person ≥ 36; CP Module 1 and 2 each ≥ 20.

6 📜

Create PDF certificates for PASSED people

Check 04_Certificates

7 📤

Send Certificate emails

Check email and PDF → run → emails send immediately.

First use: Python + Outlook Bcc
  1. Double-click Install ESR Automation Prerequisites.cmd
  2. Wait for Python packages OK
  3. Outlook: File → Settings

  1. Mail → Compose → Always show Bcc

Important rules and folders
  • Formal Register: Safety Document - SFD Register\TWSHXHV_ESR_OverallRegister.xlsm
  • Worksheet written by the tool: Old Training Register
  • Existing training validity: 730 days; less than 30 days shows EXPIRING SOON
  • Current Training Hub attempt: results from only the latest about 6 months
  • Email templates: 00_Template\Training email Templates
  • Training results: 02_Processing
  • Certificates: 04_Certificates
  • Retraining email: 4. Person _ CP Re-training Required.oft

Stuck?

Close related Excel / Outlook windows, then run the same command again.

docs.title: ESR P/CP Training｜照順序操作
docs.text:
約 95% 自動化 · 發現小 bug 會持續修正 ▶️ 每次都從這裡開始 Run ESR Training Automation (中文).cmd

會真的寄出 Email

Command 3 與 7 會直接寄信。執行前先確認人員與 Email。

docs.title: 日常流程取得候選名單CLI → Command 1CLI → Command 2CLI → Command 3CLI → Command 4，再 Command 5CLI → Command 6CLI → Command 7
docs.text:
1 📨

寄出 1. Person _ CP Candidate Request.oft

收到 Excel → 放入 01_Inbox\P_CP Candidate Lists

2 📥

匯入廠商 P/CP 候選名單

若看到 COPY TO TEMPLATE 2：複製名單 → 貼入 Template 2 → 寄給廠商。

3 🌐

加入 SharePoint Site access

執行時不要使用滑鼠或鍵盤。

4 ✉️

寄送 Training invitation

檢查白底人員 → 執行 → Email 直接寄出。

5 🔎

掃描待處理人員 → 查 Training Hub 成績

Person ≥ 36；CP Module 1、2 各 ≥ 20。

6 📜

產生 PASSED 人員 PDF 證書

檢查 04_Certificates

7 📤

寄送 Certificate email

檢查 Email 與 PDF → 執行 → Email 直接寄出。

第一次使用：Python + Outlook Bcc
  1. 雙擊 Install ESR Automation Prerequisites.cmd
  2. 等待顯示 Python packages OK
  3. Outlook：File → Settings

  1. Mail → Compose → Always show Bcc

重要規則與資料位置
  • 正式 Register：Safety Document - SFD Register\TWSHXHV_ESR_OverallRegister.xlsm
  • 寫入工作頁：Old Training Register
  • 已有訓練紀錄有效期：730 天；少於 30 天會顯示 EXPIRING SOON
  • 本次 Training Hub 成績：只採用最近約 6 個月的結果
  • Email templates：00_Template\Training email Templates
  • Training results：02_Processing
  • Certificates：04_Certificates
  • 需要重訓時：使用 4. Person _ CP Re-training Required.oft

卡住？

關閉相關 Excel / Outlook 視窗，再執行同一個 command。

docs.title: Step 0｜First-time setup
docs.text:
Do this once. Repeat only after OneDrive is reinstalled or its path changes.

1 🌐 Open OAIC SharePoint Open SharePoint 2 ☁️ Find the folder → Sync

Choose the workflow you need.

3 ✅ Wait for OneDrive

When File Explorer shows a green tick, open the latest automation file once.

4 🐍 ESR Training only Install ESR Automation Prerequisites.cmd

Python packages OK means it is ready.

5 ▶️ Close Word / Excel → Start

Return to Home and choose a workflow.

Which folders should I sync? Workflow SharePoint folder 3DLA MoM PROJECT TWSHXESR / Documents / General / 3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA / MoM 3DLA Overview PROJECT TWSHXESR / Documents / General / 3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA / Overview ESR Training PROJECT TWSHXESR / Documents / General / ESR AutoDoc Hub / 04_ESR Training ESR Register PROJECT TWSHXESR / Documents / General / Safety Document - SFD Register DPR PROJECT TWSHXHV / offshore daily report

File not found?

Check for the green tick → close Office → run again.

docs.title: Step 0｜第一次設定
docs.text:
只需設定一次。OneDrive 重裝或路徑改變時，再做一次。

1 🌐 開啟 OAIC SharePoint Open SharePoint 2 ☁️ 找到資料夾 → 按 Sync

選擇你要使用的 workflow。

3 ✅ 等 OneDrive 完成同步

在 File Explorer 看到綠色勾勾後，開啟最新 automation file 一次。

4 🐍 ESR Training only Install ESR Automation Prerequisites.cmd

看到 Python packages OK 即完成。

5 ▶️ 關閉 Word / Excel → 開始

回到首頁，選擇要執行的 workflow。

需要同步哪些資料夾？ Workflow SharePoint 資料夾 3DLA MoM PROJECT TWSHXESR / Documents / General / 3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA / MoM 3DLA Overview PROJECT TWSHXESR / Documents / General / 3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA / Overview ESR Training PROJECT TWSHXESR / Documents / General / ESR AutoDoc Hub / 04_ESR Training ESR Register PROJECT TWSHXESR / Documents / General / Safety Document - SFD Register DPR PROJECT TWSHXHV / offshore daily report

找不到檔案？

確認綠色勾勾 → 關閉 Office → 再執行一次。

docs.title: Feedback thank you
docs.text:
Feedback received

Thank you for helping us improve

Your suggestion has been sent to Charlie's OAIC inbox. It will be reviewed and used to keep the automation guides clear, accurate and practical.

感謝你的建議。內容已送出，將用於持續改善自動化教學的正確性與實用性。

docs.title: Index
docs.text:
Internal Automation Guide Hub

OAIC ESR AutoDoc Hub

An internal guide hub to help colleagues quickly find the workflows for Training, DPR, 3DLA, and MoM, reduce repeated manual work, and make handover easier.

給內部同事使用的自動化教學入口，快速找到 Training、DPR、3DLA、MoM 的操作方式，減少重複手動作業，也讓交接更清楚。

3DLA Overview 3DLA MoM DPR ESR Training ONS / OSS HV Safety BoP Documentation AP / CP Workflow

Internal quick start

One place to learn how to use the automation tools

This site is built for colleagues who need fast answers: what to run, where to place files, what the automation produces and what to check before sharing the final document. It keeps the training material practical, bilingual and easy to search.

Quick guides

Operational Workflows Report workflow order Daily reporting sequence
  1. 13DLA Overview
  2. 23DLA MoM
  3. 3DPR
  4. 4ESR Training
Step 1

Look ahead

3DLA Overview

Start here: prepare the 3-day look ahead overview for planned activities.

English Guide 中文指南 Step 2

Coordination

3DLA MoM

Then use the MoM workflow for meeting records and action tracking.

English Guide 中文指南 Step 3

Daily reporting

DPR

Finally generate tomorrow's DPR, update dates, reset photos and check the output.

English Guide 中文指南 Step 4

Safety competence

ESR Training

Prepare candidate lists, run the training tool and create certificates.

English Guide 中文指南

Practical and controlled

Beautiful enough to trust, simple enough to use every day

This hub is designed to reduce repetitive manual work, so everyone can spend more time on what matters most: ESR judgement, safety checks, coordination, and final document quality.

1 Close related Office files before running automation. 2 Review generated records before upload or issue. 3 Escalate unclear ESR / ENSR / WTSR boundaries to SAP. Field note: If something does not run as expected, close the related Word or Excel files first and try again. Most automation issues come from Office still holding the file open. OAIC Power System Solutions Internal Documentation Portal · Version v0.3 Maintained by Charlie Tseng · Last updated: 2026-07-06

docs.title: 3DLA MoM Automation - Quick Guide
docs.text:
Hi everyone, to make the daily ESR 3DLA MoM preparation a little easier, this folder now includes an automated Word report generator.

The aim is not to replace anyone's review. It simply takes care of the repetitive parts first, so we can spend more time checking the content, risks, and interfaces properly.

docs.title: Before You Start
docs.text:
• Please complete the target day's 3DLA Overview Excel first.
  • The Overview Excel should be saved in: ..\Overview
  • Please close Word before running the tool, so the Word file is not locked.
  • If the Overview Excel is still open, please save it first.

docs.title: Daily Use
docs.text:
1. Complete and save tomorrow's Overview Excel.
  2. Close all Word windows.
  3. In the MoM folder, double-click: Close Word First - Generate Tomorrow 3DLA MoM.cmd
  4. The tool will generate tomorrow's MoM Word file automatically.
  5. After opening the new Word file, please quickly check:
  6. Date
  7. Meeting no.
  8. 5. Attachments - A. 3DLA Overview
  9. B. HV System Overview
  10. Once checked, continue with any meeting notes or PDF export as usual.

docs.title: What The Automation Does
docs.text:
• Finds the most suitable previous MoM Word file to use as the template.
  • Creates the new Word file using the correct date-based name, for example: OWP2-ESR-3DLA-MOM-260704-01.docx
  • Updates the Word header fields:
  • Date
  • Meeting no.
  • Finds the matching Overview Excel for the target date, for example: OWP2-ESR-3DLA-Overview-20260704.xlsx
  • Captures the 3DLA Overview from the Excel EN worksheet.
  • Uses only the range that contains visible text or values, so empty rows below the table are not pasted into Word.
  • Converts the Overview into an image and inserts it into: 5. Attachments - A. 3DLA Overview
  • Trims unnecessary white space around the image so it fits the page width and stays readable.
  • Keeps the original Word layout, tables, and other attachment content.
  • Does not overwrite an existing file by default, to avoid replacing a version already edited by someone.

docs.title: If The File Already Exists
docs.text:
If a MoM Word file already exists for the same date, the tool will stop and warn you. It will not overwrite it automatically.

If you are sure you want to regenerate it, run this in PowerShell:

powershell -Sta -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "OAIC Ltd\PROJECT_TWSHXESR - Documents\General\3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA\MoM\Generate Tomorrow 3DLA MoM - Code.ps1" -TargetDate "2026-07-04" -Overwrite -Open

Please change the date to the report date you need.

docs.title: Common Situations
docs.text: Situation What To Do The tool says Word is still open Close all Word windows and run it again The Overview Excel cannot be found Check that the target date Excel exists in ..\Overview Attachment A does not look right Check the Overview Excel content and row heights, then regenerate the MoM The same date MoM already exists Use -Overwrite only if you are sure you want to rebuild it The Word still needs edits That is normal. The tool prepares the draft; final review is still manual

docs.title: Gentle Reminders
docs.text:
• This automation prepares the report draft and inserts the Overview. The final content still needs a human check.
  • If the Overview has many activities, the image will be scaled to fit the page, but it is still worth opening the Word file for a quick look.
  • Saving a few minutes on repeated formatting gives us a little more space to focus on ESR, SIMOPS, and interface checks.

docs.title: 3DLA MoM 自動化 - 快速指南
docs.text:
大家好，為了讓每天產生 ESR 3DLA MoM 稍微輕鬆一點，這個資料夾已經加入自動產生 Word 報告的功能。

它的目的不是取代大家的判斷，而是先把重複、容易漏的小動作做好，讓我們把時間留給真正重要的事：確認內容、風險和介面資訊是否正確。

docs.title: 使用前請先確認
docs.text:
• 今日或明日的 3DLA Overview Excel 已經完成。
  • Overview Excel 放在： ..\Overview
  • Word 請先關閉，避免檔案被鎖住。
  • 如果 Excel 正在編輯 Overview，也建議先儲存。

docs.title: 日常使用方式
docs.text:
1. 先完成並儲存明天的 Overview Excel。
  2. 關閉所有 Word 視窗。
  3. 在 MoM 資料夾雙擊： Close Word First - Generate Tomorrow 3DLA MoM.cmd
  4. 程式會自動產生明天的 MoM Word。
  5. 開啟新 Word 後，請快速檢查：
  6. Date
  7. Meeting no.
  8. 5. Attachments - A. 3DLA Overview
  9. B. HV System Overview
  10. 確認內容後，再手動補充會議內容或輸出 PDF。

docs.title: 這個程式會自動做什麼
docs.text:
• 找到合適的前一份 MoM Word 作為模板。
  • 依日期產生新的檔名，例如： OWP2-ESR-3DLA-MOM-260704-01.docx
  • 自動更新 Word 裡的：
  • Date
  • Meeting no.
  • 從 Overview 資料夾找到目標日期的 Excel，例如： OWP2-ESR-3DLA-Overview-20260704.xlsx
  • 從 Excel EN 工作表擷取 3DLA Overview。
  • 只擷取有文字或數值的範圍，避免把下方空白一起貼進 Word。
  • 將 Overview 轉成圖片並貼到： 5. Attachments - A. 3DLA Overview
  • 自動裁掉圖片周圍多餘空白，讓它看起來貼齊頁寬、比較好讀。
  • 保留原本 Word 的版面、表格和其他附件內容。
  • 預設不覆蓋既有檔案，避免不小心蓋掉同事已修改的版本。

docs.title: 如果當天檔案已經存在
docs.text:
如果已經有同一天的 MoM Word，程式會停止並提醒你，不會直接覆蓋。

如果你確定要重新產生，可以用 PowerShell 執行：

powershell -Sta -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "OAIC Ltd\PROJECT_TWSHXESR - Documents\General\3-Day Look Ahead - 3DLA\MoM\Generate Tomorrow 3DLA MoM - Code.ps1" -TargetDate "2026-07-04" -Overwrite -Open

請把日期改成你要重新產生的日期。

docs.title: 常見狀況
docs.text: 狀況 建議處理 程式說 Word 還開著 關閉所有 Word 視窗後再跑一次 找不到 Overview Excel 先確認 ..\Overview 裡是否已有目標日期 Excel Attachment A 圖片看起來不對 先確認 Overview Excel 的內容和列高是否正常，再重新產生 已經產生過同一天 MoM 若要重做，請用 -Overwrite Word 開啟後內容還要調整 可以正常手動修改，程式只是幫你先做好底稿

docs.title: 小提醒
docs.text:
• 這份自動化主要幫忙做「產生底稿」和「貼 Overview」，最後內容仍需要人工檢查。
  • 如果 Overview Excel 當天工項很多，圖片會自動依頁面空間縮放，但仍建議打開 Word 看一次。
  • 每天多省一點重複操作時間，大家就能多留一點精神給 ESR / SIMOPS / interface 的確認。
